conflictBlocks.oursContent:
const rows = await sql`
      INSERT INTO campaign_maps (
        campaign_id,
        title,
        background_url,
        background_color,
        grid_enabled,
        is_default,
        sort_order,
        grid_size,
        grid_opacity,
        grid_color,
        created_by
      )
      VALUES (
        ${campaignId},
        ${title},
        ${backgroundUrl},
        ${backgroundColor},
        ${gridEnabled},
        ${shouldDefault},
        0,
        ${gridSize},
        ${gridOpacity},
        ${gridColor},
        ${session.user.id}
      )
      RETURNING id, campaign_id, title, background_url, background_color, grid_enabled,
                is_default, sort_order, grid_size, grid_opacity, grid_color,
                created_by, created_at, updated_at
    `;

preservedBehaviors.description: GET /campaigns/[id]/maps returns 401 when unauthenticated, 400 for invalid id, 403 for non-members
GET returns maps array with activeMapId and isOwner flag
POST requires owner role, returns 403 for non-owners
PATCH requires owner role and valid mapId
DELETE requires owner role and valid mapId via searchParams
Campaign page has tab system with map, chat, call, sound, dice, characters, sessions, npcs, loot, members tabs
CampaignMapPanel imports and uses useGridStyle hook, MapCanvas, ToolPanel, CreateMapForm
CampaignMapPanel manages zoom, selectedTokenId, selectedMapId states
CampaignMapPanel has canDragToken logic: owner can drag any, player can drag own PC only
MapCanvas has zoom in/out controls, displays zoom percentage, applies transform scale
MapCanvas applies gridStyle to map area and renders tokens
useGridStyle generates CSS grid lines using linear-gradient with grid_size, grid_opacity, grid_color
useGridStyle respects grid_enabled flag and handles background_url
API route has parseHexColor function that validates 6-char hex and normalizes with hash
API route uses parseHexColor for backgroundColor (#111827 default) and gridColor (#ffffff default)
API route has parseGridSize (8-200) and parseGridOpacity (0-0.5) validators
MapCanvas uses useCallback for zoom functions with 0.5-2.5 range
useGridStyle defaults background_color to #111827
CampaignMapPanel initializes createBackgroundColor to #111827
API route has parseSortOrder function clamping 0-100000
API route POST uses sql.transaction for insert with setDefault support
API route POST inserts sort_order, grid_size, grid_opacity, grid_color columns
CreateMapForm has sort order, set default toggle, grid size/opacity, grid/background color controls
ToolPanel has map settings section with title editor, sort order, background color, upload/clear, grid controls
CampaignMapPanel manages createSortOrder and createSetDefault state and passes to CreateMapForm/ToolPanel
